query:
INSERT INTO kms_key_activation_events (
            chain_id,
            block_hash,
            block_number,
            transaction_hash,
            key_id,
            key_digest_server,
            key_digest_public,
            storage_urls
        )
        VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8)
        ON CONFLICT (chain_id, block_hash, key_id)
        DO NOTHING
